TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kahaehaeoan, title = Kahaehaeoan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kahaehaeoan} }

S.FORM: alang Kahaehaeoan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 27 buwan, 60 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 54 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 73%, Tayan 15%, Amis 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kahaehaeoan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kahaehaeoan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kahaehaeoan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kahaehaeoan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kahaehaeoan hya' ga Sansama:an. tay mkyahu' na Kahaehaeoan hya' ga Sayie. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kahaehaeoan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 27 buwan, 60 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 54 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 73%, Tayan 15%, Amis 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kahaehaeoan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kahaehaeoan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kahaehaeoan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kahaehaeoan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kahaehaeoan hya' ga Sansama:an. tay mkyahu' na Kahaehaeoan hya' ga Sayie. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kaħaeħaeoan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kaħaeħaeoan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kaħaeħaeoan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kaħaeħaeoan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kaħaeħaeoan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kaħaeħaeoan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕans~ɕama:an. taj mkjaħuʔ na kaħaeħaeoan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕajie. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
